title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mindtree - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mindtree - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mindtree in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mindtree:
Mindtree is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree!
